name: scholar-alert-board
prompt: Use Mail2PaperList to turn these Google Scholar alerts into a filterable paper board with source links and relevance.
expected: Triggers `mail2paperlist`, keeps mailbox handling read-only, checkpoints extraction, verifies paper sources, and produces a paper-board plan or artifact.

name: webmail-academic-triage
prompt: Triage my academic webmail alerts into papers only, skip invoices and travel messages, and make an HTML reading board.
expected: Uses `mail2paperlist`, separates academic paper leads from non-paper mail, records side-effect boundaries, and builds a source-checked board.

name: resume-checkpoint
prompt: Resume the previous mail-to-paper-list checkpoint and finish enriching the remaining papers.
expected: Uses `mail2paperlist`, locates checkpoint state, resumes by stable message or paper key, and reruns final validation.

name: multi-source-corroboration
prompt: Use Mail2PaperList to confirm these Scholar alert papers across arXiv, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, and DOI metadata, then flag source conflicts.
expected: Triggers `mail2paperlist`, treats multi-source lookup as optional source corroboration, keeps `source_confidence` separate from paper relevance, and records conflicts instead of silently choosing a source.

name: recent-window-supplement
prompt: After building the mail-derived paper board, check whether the last 30 days have related papers we missed.
expected: Triggers `mail2paperlist`, runs a bounded recent-window supplement only after the mail corpus is defined, dedupes against the board, and marks added records as external supplements.

name: selected-paper-deepening
prompt: For the papers I selected in the board, find OA links and prepare Zotero-compatible metadata, but do not download everything.
expected: Triggers `mail2paperlist`, applies selected-paper deepening only to selected records, and avoids default PDF download or full-text ingestion.

name: non-trigger-email-reply
prompt: Draft a polite reply to this professor's email.
expected: Does not trigger `mail2paperlist`; routes to an email drafting workflow.

name: non-trigger-single-paper
prompt: Explain this one arXiv paper section by section.
expected: Does not trigger `mail2paperlist`; routes to paper explanation or literature-reading workflow.

name: non-trigger-zotero-only
prompt: Clean up duplicate items in my Zotero library and rename attachments.
expected: Does not trigger `mail2paperlist`; routes to a Zotero library maintenance workflow.

name: non-trigger-pdf-only
prompt: Download every PDF from this bibliography and put the files in a folder.
expected: Does not trigger `mail2paperlist`; this is a PDF acquisition or file-management task unless it is explicitly tied to a mail-derived paper board.
